prestazioni: Engine swap to a Vortec 6.2L L92 (6.2L V8, 403 hp, 417 lb-ft) with a custom Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (10 psi boost) and a Kenne Bell Mammoth 4.5L intercooler system, paired with a GM Performance CNC-ported LS3 cylinder heads and a COMP Cams 281HR camshaft (231°/239° duration, 0.617" lift) for 650+ whp on E85 fuel

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a G-Force GSR-45X 4-speed automatic transmission (rated for 1,000 lb-ft), a custom billet torque converter from Circle D (3,800 stall), and a Strange Engineering 9.5" S60 rear differential with 4.10:1 gearing and a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential

Suspension overhaul with King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (8" travel, 3-way adjustable damping), custom-fabricated 1.5" front and 2" rear lift blocks from Rough Country, and Hellwig 8920 sway bars (1.25" front, 1" rear) to handle 37x12.5R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +18 offset)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Fab Fours H2 V2 front bumper with integrated Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bars (50" curved, 10,000 lumens) and a Fab Fours rear bumper with a Warn Zeon 12-S winch (12,000 lb capacity) and a hidden recovery hitch

Full Rocket Bunny H2 aero kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber hood scoop, and rear diffuser) with a custom PPF wrap in Avery Dennison Gloss Black (Matte Black accents on fender flares) and a 3M Scotchprint Wrap vinyl overlay for a textured "military spec" finish

Interior overhaul with Katzkin leather seats (H2-specific pattern, perforated inserts, red stitching), a custom roll cage from The Cage Shop (8-point, chromoly steel, bolt-in design), and a full Alpine iLX-F509 multimedia system with a 10.1" touchscreen, Hertz MLK 165.3 components, and a JL Audio 12W7AE subwoofer in a sealed enclosure
